title: Time Vortex Optimizations
description: Time Vortex Optimizations is designed to enhance the Minecraft experience by providing performance-optimizing mods and tools that make gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.
body:
# Information

Time Vortex Optimizations enhances Minecraft gameplay with performance-optimizing mods and convenient tools. Expect lag-free gameplay and smoother animations, thanks to mods that improve game performance. The modpack also includes features like inventory management, expanded crafting, and improved storage systems to make progression easier. Time Vortex Optimizations is perfect for players looking for an optimized and enhanced Minecraft experience.

If any mod creator has an issue with their mod being included or wants to be credited, please contact me here: [thedoctor@thetimevortex.net](mailto:thedoctor@thetimevortex.net)

# Credit

No longer included in newer versions but still in older versions of the modpack:

- **Xaero's Minimap**
  [https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)

- **Xaero's World Map**
  [https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
